title: WolfCraft
description: Season 6 needed a monetary modification, but the administration couldn't find a really good mod.
body:
# Wolfcraft Mod
WolfCraft Mod is simple money modification. There are 4 types of coins in it: copper, iron, gold, netherite. All coins are made from one unit of material (copper, iron, gold, netherite ingots) and one template. The template cannot be created for the balance, it may be changed in the future.
